overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a fantasy game showing a character in wizard robes walking along a snow-covered castle terrace with ornate stone balustrades, overlooking a distant gothic castle and snow-capped mountains under a partly cloudy winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered castle terrace with stone balustrade overlooking mountain valley

agents.ego_description: character in dark wizard robes with red accents walking slowly along the snowy terrace toward the castle view

entered.detail: simple wooden stool sitting on the snow near the balustrade
ornate stone railing with decorative pillars and carved details running along the terrace edge
large gothic castle with multiple spires, towers, and stone walls perched on the mountainside
black ornate street lamp mounted on a decorated stone pedestal
stone bench covered with a layer of snow
snow-capped mountain peaks and slopes surrounding the distant castle

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily along a snow-covered terrace of a historic castle, passing a wooden stool on the left while approaching an ornate lamp post and stone bench on the right. The majestic Hogwarts castle stands prominently in the distance against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains, with the scene bathed in cool winter morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a steady camera movement along a snow-covered castle terrace that gradually reveals a panoramic view of a distant gothic fortress. It begins by tracking a character in robes as they walk past a wooden stool on the left, moving deeper into the cool winter morning light. As the character advances, the camera passes an ornate lamp post and a stone bench on the right, shifting the focus toward the horizon. The scene then opens up to fully showcase the majestic Hogwarts castle standing prominently against a backdrop of towering, snow-capped mountains.
